generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PM_SynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance PM_SynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller controlling motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance AngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from position encoders of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data from position encoders of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation and friction model identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset description and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical to virtual"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance CustomDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard visualization tools for real-time data display"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance BDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis system structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance IBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis system structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for robot motion simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for robot motion simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for robot motion simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for robot motion simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 first axis asset description"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization dashboard for integrated sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction models for robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight, AdjustRobotControlAlgorithms
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of sensor data for monitoring MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data analysis used to adjust robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance AdjustRobotControlAlgorithms : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting robot control algorithms based on friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Not applicable; digital shadow is a passive one-way data flow entity with no data transmission from virtual to physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data streamed via MQTT, enabling immediate processing and analysis of operational data."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of sensor data, simulation models, and visualization dashboard within a digital shadow framework, where data traces are linked to engineering models for contextual understanding of friction dynamics."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; continuously monitoring and adapting to wear, tool changes, and operational variations during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data to validate friction model accuracy, identifying deviations for model refinement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) per Industry 4.0 standards (IEC 63278) and SysML for system modeling."
]
